programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Unsaddled and Unraveled: Booger heads to Austin to work with a former contestant in preparation for the Road to the Horse competition. He quickly realizes that there's more to this competition than handling a colt, and presentation has a lot to do with his score. Cody finds the perfect herd to start a special cattle sale and shares his idea for the business with Bubba, but he is hesitant. Once Booger is back, the cowboys meet to discuss the future of their business, but they don't all see eye-to-eye. Cody and Bubba want to be supportive of Booger but are frustrated that his dedication to the Road to the Horse competition has taken priority over their business. The lack of direction causes tension between the cowboys. Feeling divided, they all start to question the future of their business.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Buckskin for the Win!: The cowboys are unable to decide on exactly how they want to move their business forward. In the meantime, they continue to take day jobs to stay afloat. With Cody still fixated on the specialty cattle sale, Misty encourages him to do it on his own, without the help of Bubba and Booger. A new opportunity falls in Bubba's lap to operate a ranch for a group of organic feed investors. While it seems to be a dream role for Bubba, he struggles with the fact that it would require him to move his family north and away from the other cowboys. After much anticipation and practice, Booger heads to Kentucky for the Road to the Horse competition, where he faces the challenge of managing an unruly horse.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.sub-title: Beyond The Surface - "Gateway To The Ten Thousand Islands
programme.desc: Experience the thrill of fishing in the enchanting waters of the Everglades alongside the renowned Captain Danny Allen and Captain Leiza Fitzgerald. Embark on an unforgettable journey through the intricate maze of mangroves, expansive marshes, and shimmering backwaters, as these expert guides lead you to some of the most coveted fishing spots in the region.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Join Captain Danny Allen and Dan Benson from Power-Pole as they embark on an exciting fishing expedition in Cortez, Florida, in the latest installment of Beyond The Surface TV. Witness their relentless pursuit of fish as they adapt to the ever-changing conditions. Don't make the mistake of skipping this captivating episode – it's bound to leave you hooked!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.sub-title: Beyond The Surface - "Conquering the Depths of Port St.Joe
programme.desc: Prepare to embark on an awe-inspiring aquatic journey as "Legendary Pursuits: Conquering the Depths of Port Saint Joe" takes you on an epic fishing adventure like no other. Join us as we cast off into the pristine waters of Port Saint Joe, a coastal paradise brimming with marine treasures waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.sub-title: Beyond The Surface - "Silver Kings of St. Augustine
programme.desc: Dive into the exhilarating world of tarpon fishing in the historic city of St. Augustine, Florida. Join Capt. Danny as henavigates the timeless waters of the oldest city in Florida, seeking the mighty tarpon. These fish will test your angling skills and endurance.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Not my first trip to Texas, but my first chance to get a Texas buck did not disappoint on this trip. What started off as just a waterfowl photography shoot turned into an opportunity for me to grab a buck tag/license. No fence, low fence, or high fence…. Texas has some great hunting! There isn't too many warm whitetail hunts that can be me excited but bonus hunts will get me every time!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In most cases, the cameraman or woman hunts as well… Often their “play time” happens between scheduled season hunts for the show. But why don't we see those? This year, I made it a point to film all of my camera girl's hunts and decided to make an episode out of it. Without help, none of this possible! So to all the camera operators, behind the scenes industry folks… Thank you and this is for you!!!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: John heads up to Saskatchewan to chase whitetails with BBD Outfitters. After some luck early in the week, an opportunity of a lifetime to take a moose is just a trigger pull away! John's friend Leslie, former Marine, and catfish angler is up to bat first as she checks off a whitetail buck and moose herself in this loaded episode! You don't know cold until it hits negative 33.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: With the Iowa Late Muzzleloader season almost over and a thick snow covering, hopes of filling “one more tag” were up in the air. A second chance at redemption was offered on an awesome 6.5 year old Iowa buck. Cold temps, food plots, and a favorable wind can be just the things needed to fill a late season tag.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In this episode, John competes in another Tactical Games event in Pennsylvania and a Total Archery Challenge. If you're not familiar with these…. The Tactical Games is a cross fit meets 2 Gun style competition. The TAC events are a big Archery 3D fun shoot with targets ranging from 15 to 120 yds! If you've never done one of these, DO IT!!!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Spring turkey is here! John sets his sights on chasing gobblers in Iowa and after notching the first tag, it's time to head back to Kentucky. John grew up in the Bluegrass state and doesn't get to hunt or visit as much as he'd like but after this season, he's reminded why it's important to return back home and keep that hunting camaraderie alive and well!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: After receiving an invite to hunt mule deer in Colorado from a buddy, I jumped at the opportunity. My first time ever hunting Colorado did not disappoint. Spot/stalk on the ground with a bow will always be the most challenging, humbling, and sometimes rewarding ways to hunt. My reward... a first ever velvet Colorado Mule Deer!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.desc: Steps of Faith is a light-heart dramedy about Faith Houston an accountant, who is directed by God to move to a small town to work on a Hippotherapy farm helping children. Faith is mocked by her family since she doesn't have a rapport with children or animals and is not a devout Christian. Faith decides to follow her heart and move after she encounters several challenges. She finds herself at the farm in the horse stalls shoveling manure. Faith cracks under pressure and leaves after a child is almost injured questioning whether she heard God's voice or not.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles

programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day

The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.desc: llow Ping and her friends as they find musical inspiration in unlikely places!

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: Yeti Tales
programme.desc: Join Us in Yeti Tales !

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Get grooving with a medley of fun kids songs like Dinosaur Song, Fruits Song, and Colors Song

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: The best nursery rhymes, every kids favorite is here, Incy Wincy Spider, Wheels on the Bus and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four curious young dinosaurs named Rocky, Bill, Tiny, and Mazu go on adventures while following their herd. Rocky is the courageous one, Bill is the most timid, Tiny is the smallest yet most playful, and Mazu is the most inquisitive. The four friends look at things such as mapping the stars and searching for flowers but most importantly, they are asserting their independence and learning to do things away from the safety of the herd.

programme.title: BooSnoo!

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers must toot their own horns to stop Lord Zedd's horrifying Trumpet Top monster.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is captured and transformed into Lord Zedd's evil queen.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Alpha and Zordon go on a secret mission, leaving the Power Rangers to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rocky's plant from Botany Class exhibits weird behavior, growing rapidly and developing an appetite for metal.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A mysterious musician in Angel Grove High is pursued by Prince Sprocket and King Mondo.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Mondo creates Mean Screen, a horrible computer monster that will infect all of the computers in Angel Grove.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Wes weighs his privileged lifestyle against the responsibilities of joining the Power Rangers Time Force.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Ransik kidnaps Wes and takes over a television station to announce his evil plans to the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: 31st century champion racecar driver Lucas adjusts to 21st century traffic laws.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Ransik hijacks a bus full of school children.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Nadira plots to capture the Rangers' robotic friend, Circuit.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jen struggles with her desire to avenge her fallen fiancÃ© when Ransik releases the Fatcatfish.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A mysterious man in the future sends the Rangers a new Zord to help in the fight against Ransik's gang.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Katie worries her actions in the present might be damaging the timeline.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Using the scream machine, each team will take turns tossing cards in the air.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bee and his team track Filch, a Decepticon with an impulsive urge to steal all things "shiny".

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Grimlock seems to turn against his friends.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 1
programme.desc: The heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 2
programme.desc: Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: The Snake King
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can't be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there's got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves - without lifting a finger! Eli thinks it sounds too good to be true... and it is. But exposing the truth draws the ire of the camp's director - and half the campers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli doesn't believe in ghosts - until he enters Deadweed cavern! But it turns out Eli's first instinct was right. What lurks inside Deadweed is far more evil than ghosts, its El Diablus Nacho, after a supply of the dangerous Dark Water that Dr. Blakk uses to turn innocent slugs into Ghouls.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan - and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures. Just when it looks like our heroes are done for, they are helped out of this jam by a most unlikely savior.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot. Only one slinger in all of Slugterra can help Eli make a shot like that - Mario Bravado. Finding the formerly-great-but-now-washed-up Mario is easy. Getting him to help is something else entirely.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After a wild ride on the mysterious Flumes - the Underriver that runs beneath all of Slugterra - the Shane gang find themselves dropped into a sea cavern.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Holiday Party Spectacular
programme.desc: Get ready for the funniest holiday sketches and hilarious Christmas mishaps, hosted by Jamie Kaler.

programme.title: John Wesley Austin: Straight Shooter
programme.desc: John Wesley Austin has been working the comedy club circuit for over 18 years, & it shows in his side-splitting and sometimes-outrageous stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton first stepped on stage in September of 1984 and he's never looked back. This ex-grade school teacher is now in his 30th year of comedy and is nearing 6000 lifetime performances. He is a past winner of the Las Vegas Comedy Festival and appeared recently at Caesar's Palace as part of the HBO Comedy Festival. He has spent the last eight years as the opening act for the legendary Johnny Mathis and did multiple shows all over the country with the late, great Joan Rivers. He has also been seen in concert with The Smothers Brothers, Smokey Robinson, Kenny Rogers, Dolly Parton, Lewis Black, George Jones, Glen Campbell, Pam Tillis and many others. Coast to coast all over North America isn't the only place Brad performs. In 2014 Brad headlined in Singapore, Hong Kong, The MGM in Macau and did eight nights in Israel as part of the Comedy for Koby benefit. His new CD entitled, "Brad Uptonogood" is heard regularly on Sirius Satellite Radio and is available online wherever music is sold. He also just released his first DVD entitled, "Brad Upton, Live from the 509".

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Orlando Baxter
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Tim Wilkins
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Maija DiGiorgio
programme.desc: Born to a black mother and an Italian father in New York City, Maija Digiorgios comedy centers on the examination of her own mixed-race identity. Digiorgio riffs on Thanksgiving with each side of her family, gender roles between the two cultlures, and her racist grandma in this special.

programme.title: Tommy Ryman
programme.desc: Tommy Ryman grew up with a new-age, folk singing mother and a traditional, Lutheran insurance-agent father. This XY equation evidently equals: acclaimed comedian. Ryman has earned the title of Semifinalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing. Roseanne Barr, a professed fan, raves she has “never seen anything like Tommy before in her whole life, he is one-of-a-kind, fantastic!” Ryman also recently won the title of Best of the Midwest at the prestigious Gilda's Laugh Fest. Ryman's act can be described as absurdist and clever, masked behind a very likable and innocent demeanor, often thought of as awkwardly charming. He is a favorite among audiences at top clubs, corporates, and colleges around the nation.

programme.title: Rob Maher: If You Can Make It Here...
programme.desc: Rob Maher proves that he has the most versatile first name in the English language, that your relationship ended because you didn't spend enough money on wrapping paper, and that being an "accident" is worse than being adopted.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: Freezing Hot
programme.desc: Smart and brazen comedian Iliza Shlesinger applies her fresh, laugh-out-loud perspective to the universal struggles between men and women.

programme.title: Todd Barry The Crowd Work Tour
programme.desc: Todd Barry went on a tour without the amazing jokes and did entire shows of riffing and bantering with the audience.

programme.title: David Cross Oh, Come On
programme.desc: Share the laughter, tears, & salty language that youve come to know and love. See what makes David Cross one of the top 400 comics in America today.

programme.title: Godfrey: Regular Black
programme.desc: Godfrey performs in his hometown of Chicago.

programme.title: Jenny McCarthys Dirty, Sexy, Funny
programme.desc: Several popular female comedians shed some light on what it's really like to be a woman.

programme.title: Chelle T: It Just Got Real
programme.desc: Laughing is great medication and now the doctor is in. Chelle T has brought with her a whirlwind of imagination, stage presence, and originality.

programme.title: Bryan Callen Never Grow Up
programme.desc: Bryan Callen discusses his dreams as a boy, his unique upbringing and what he wishes to pass on to his children.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's sci-fi classic! It's a tale of a man who transforms into a violent lizard creature whenever he is in the sun too long! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Hideous Sun Demon!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Lycan Colony takes everything you know about werewolves and asks “But what if it were dumber, cheaper, and the aspect ratio occasionally got all squished up for no apparent reason?” This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the custodial arts. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Color it Clean!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's horror classic about a satanic cult in a mysterious doll shop. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for The Devils Hand!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: It's Invaders from Mars! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this lawn care short. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Frustrating Fours and Goodbye, Weeds!

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life in Julie & Julia, the true stories of how Julia Child's (Meryl Streep) life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell (Amy Adams) to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. Stanley Tucci (The Devil Wears Prada) co-stars in director Nora Ephron's delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appétit!

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: The inspiring true story behind Christian band MercyMe's beloved, chart topping song that brings ultimate hope to so many with the power of true love and forgiveness.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Inspired by the perennial bestseller, WHAT TO EXPECT WHEN YOU'RE EXPECTING is a hilarious and heartfelt comedy about five couples whose intertwined lives are turned upside down by the challenges of impending parenthood. The movie features “lots of laughs, heart , and a terrific ensemble of actors at their best” (Pete Hammond, Box Office Magazine) and is “A must see!” (Gayle King, O Magazine). The film stars Cameron Diaz, Jennifer Lopez, Elizabeth Banks, Chace Crawford, Brooklyn Decker, Anna Kendrick, Matthew Morrison, Dennis Quaid, Chris Rock, Rodrigo Santoro, Ben Falcone and Joe Manganiello.

programme.title: Falling for Christmas
programme.desc: When champion figure skater Claire becomes injured she is sent to a rehabilitation center in the snowy mountains where she meets and falls for a local ice fisherman who shows her there is more to life than competition.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: A Christmas miracle gives rival meteorologists Tara and Sam the opportunity of a lifetime to move up to the big leagues. In order to reach their dream job interview, they first have to beat an impending blizzard to the city.

programme.title: Sappy Holiday
programme.desc: When a hardworking but uninspired sous chef accidentally discovers her boyfriend is going to propose to her on Christmas Eve, she begins doubting their future together especially when a handsome maple farmer rescues her from a snowstorm.

programme.title: Christmas Miracle of Jonathan Toomey
programme.desc: When a broken hearted boy loses the treasured wooden nativity set, his worried mother persuades an ill-tempered woodcarver to create a replacement. As Christmas approaches, the three struggle to come to terms with their painful memories and begin putting their unhappiness behind them.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg stars as a sassy lounge singer forced to hide from the mob in the last place anyone would ever look for her - a convent. Harvey Keitel and Kathy Najimy join a heavenly cast in this habit-forming comedy bursting with '60s Motown hits.

programme.title: The Proposal (2009)
programme.desc: When high-powered book editor faces deportation back to Canada, she declares that she's actually engaged to her put-upon assistant who she's tormented for years.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life in Julie & Julia, the true stories of how Julia Child's (Meryl Streep) life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell (Amy Adams) to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. Stanley Tucci (The Devil Wears Prada) co-stars in director Nora Ephron's delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appétit!

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: The inspiring true story behind Christian band MercyMe's beloved, chart topping song that brings ultimate hope to so many with the power of true love and forgiveness.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: When Martin Lawrence (Bad Boys) and Steve Zahn (Daddy Day Care) team up as security guards, no one's safe! LAPD reject and major troublemaker, Earl (Lawrence), got L.A. cop Hank (Zahn) kicked off the force for brutality. Now, these two guys, who can't stand each other, are stuck working together as lowly security guards. And they're playing cops to bring down a smuggling ring if they can stay alive and stay one step ahead of the real cops. Co-starring Eric Roberts (The Specialist), NATIONAL SECURITY will take you on a wild ride with the most unlikely heroes ever to wear a badge!

programme.title: Hellboy (2004)
programme.desc: From visionary writer/director Guillermo del Toro (director of Blade II, The Devil's Backbone) comes Hellboy, a supernatural action adventure based on Mike Mignola's popular Dark Horse Comics series of the same name. Born in the flames of hell and brought to Earth as an infant to perpetrate evil, Hellboy (Ron Perlman) was rescued from sinister forces by the benevolent Dr. Broom (John Hurt), who raised him to be a hero. In Dr. Broom's secret Bureau of Paranormal Research and Defense, Hellboy creates an unlikely family consisting of the telepathic "Mer-Man" Abe Sapien (Doug Jones) and Liz Sherman (Selma Blair), the woman he loves who can control fire. Hidden from the very society that they protect, they stand as the key line of defense against an evil madman who seeks to reclaim Hellboy to the dark side and use his powers to destroy mankind.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: When their attempt to rob a casino owned by the feared gangster Pope (Robert De Niro) goes awry and a shootout ensues, Vaughn (Jeffrey Dean Morgan) and Cox (Dave Bautista) are forced to flee on foot and hijack city Bus 657 and take the passengers hostage. Now, in a high speed chase, Vaughn will not only have to outwit the police, led by Officer Bajos (Gina Carano) who are in hot pursuit, but he will have to contend with Pope's maniacal right hand man, Dog (Morris Chestnut), in order to make it through the day alive. But we quickly learn that things are not what they seem, and Vaughn has more than one card up his sleeve.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: In this high-energy action saga, clever car thief Mikey is forced to go undercover at a grand-theft-auto ring led by a violent leader whose gorgeous girlfriend Mikey can't resist.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Belinda and her ex are forced to team up for the towns Christmas Scavenger Hunt.

programme.title: A Family Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amber spends the holidays with her Aunt Dora and helps plan a Christmas Concert.

programme.title: Christmas Song
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. 2 music teachers compete in the largest televised Christmas carol competition.

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's Trading Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. In this holiday tale about twists of fate, Emily and Charles find love.

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Interior designer Laura returns to Utah to spearhead the renovation of a hotel.

programme.title: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: Courtney must rally her skating class to throw a Christmas Carnival.

programme.title: Delivering Christmas
programme.desc: Handsome but lonely mailman, Tom, has a crush on Lauren.

programme.title: The Holiday Fix Up
programme.desc: Sam returns to her hometown during the holidays to renovate the Bell Harbor Inn.

programme.title: Kirk Franklin's A Gospel Christmas
programme.desc: Olivia gets assigned to be a lead pastor at a new church a month before Christmas.

programme.title: Mini Movie: The Christmas Snowman
programme.desc: A woman wakes to discover her new handsome neighbor.

programme.title: Kirk Franklin's The Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: Journee and Nia are caught in a snowstorm and they take refuge inside a church.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict fights to protect his estranged daughter from the drug cartel that is hunting her down.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A lawyer takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Rambo
programme.desc: When a group of aid workers disappears, John Rambo accompanies a group of mercenaries on a rescue mission.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine?s youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The machine elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg into the past to kill a young boy.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Ex-pilot Cooper must leave his family and Earth behind to lead an expedition beyond this galaxy.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A drunken U.S. Marshal and a Texas Ranger help a stubborn teenager track down her father's murderer.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Will & Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their folklore only to discover their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and a Manhattan ADA try to bring to justice a powerful bank which is financing terrorism.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: A family is stranded on an island in the "27th dimension" after a strange storm causes their boat to sink.

programme.title: Emma's Chance
programme.desc: At a horse rescue, Emma forms an unlikely bond with an abused horse and works to save the ranch she loves.

programme.title: Bingo
programme.desc: A herocie dog runs into many misadventures as he tries to return home.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: A daughter brings her fiance home to meet her parents, not having told them he s black.

programme.title: Shopworn
programme.desc: Stanwyck is a waitress engaged to Toomey though his mother opposes her son's marriage to Stanwyck.

programme.title: Doctor Faustus
programme.desc: An aging scholar sells his soul to the devil in exchange for youth, knowledge and power.

programme.title: Phffft!
programme.desc: After years of marriage, Robert and Nina divorce. Both date other people while try and ignore each other.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: The Words
programme.desc: A writer at the peak of his literary success discovers the price he must pay for stealing another man's work.

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Problem Child 2
programme.desc: Ben Healy (John Ritter) and his adopted son, the mischievous and destructive Junior (Michael Oliver), move to a new town for a fresh start in what happens to be "the divorcée capital of the world." Now the two face a multitude of women throwing themselves at Ben, though a new mom isn't what Junior wants. But Junior has more to worry about than his father's dates -- the little troublemaker might have met his match in Trixie Young (Ivyann Schwan), a small girl with a big chip on her shoulder.

programme.title: Problem Child 3: Junior in Love
programme.desc: First love for unruly preteen Junior (Justin Chapman) means aggravation for dad (William Katt), grandpa (Jack Warden) and others.

programme.title: It's a Very Merry Muppet Christmas Movie
programme.desc: Kermit tries to save the theater from a banker (Joan Cusack) who wants to demolish it and open a trendy nightclub.

programme.title: Scoot and Kassie's Christmas Adventure
programme.desc: Kassie rescues a retired, wounded police dog and names him Scoot. She and her friends organize a charity concert to raise money for less-fortunate kids, and Scoot has to save the day when two crooks make plans to steal the donated money.

programme.title: Dragonheart: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A young stable boy (Christopher Masterson) with dreams of being a knight discovers a baby dragon and tries to help him learn how to fly and fight.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: Christmas By Candlelight
programme.desc: Wellness expert, Juliet, works on Christmas memory candles with boutique store owner Tom.

programme.title: Too Cool for Christmas
programme.desc: Lindsay thinks she is too cool to be with her family on Christmas. When she ends up delivering presents with Santa himself, she finds out what Christmas really means.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them, using various tactics.

programme.title: The Intimate
programme.desc: A bride-to-be accepts an invitation from a stranger to be his woman for a day, thinking it is her last fling.

programme.title: Miss Butcher
programme.desc: A man is brutally murdered. Gu-ho, the detective in charge, suspects Soon-ae, who runs a butcher's shop.

programme.title: Hot Young Bloods
programme.desc: In the '80s, heartthrob Joong-gil ignores Young-sook, while newcomer So-hee becomes her rival in love.

programme.title: Mr. Hit Me Up
programme.desc: Lifelong best friends, two men seemingly beat the trauma of their childhood. However, one holds in a fatal secret he can no longer suppress. A podcast would challenge that love and expose the deepest of secrets of the other as he unintentionally falls in love with his best friend's girlfriend in this spiraled drama. Who does he choose?

programme.title: Missing You This Christmas TV-14
programme.desc: Carmen's family has an annual Christmas tradition that supports her neighborhood. When her mother dies suddenly, she looses the holiday spirit, and no longer wants to continue, until she's visited by her late father's spirit who encourages her to keep hope alive.
